hook: Decisiveness is useful only when it stays connected to reality.
body: You can lead the moment without pretending you know what the other person feels before they show you.

hook: False certainty can make men miss feedback because they are too committed to the story in their head.
body: Lead with a plan, but keep your ego light enough to adjust cleanly if the vibe says otherwise.

hook: Lead with a plan, but keep your ego light enough to adjust cleanly if the vibe says otherwise.
body: Offering an idea for the date and then reading her response is stronger than forcing the pace because you think confident men never adapt.
